title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Flipkart Books Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Flipkart Books Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Flipkart Books Ventures Solutions in Hyderabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Flipkart Books Ventures Solutions:
Flipkart Books Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart Books Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
